introSection: Serpent Dragon is a steel launched roller coaster located at Sochi Park in Sochi, Krasnodar Krai, Russia. The ride was built by Mack Rides and constructed by RCS GmbH. Serpent Dragon is a clone of blue fire Megacoaster at Europa Park.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Dark yellow track and red supports.

fullText:
Serpent Dragon is a steel launched roller coaster located at Sochi Park in Sochi, Krasnodar Krai, Russia. The ride was built by Mack Rides and constructed by RCS GmbH. Serpent Dragon is a clone of blue fire Megacoaster at Europa Park.

Dark yellow track and red supports.
